title: bulga japonica
intro: Bulga japonica, also known as Angelica keiskei, is a perennial plant native to Japan and parts of East Asia, characterized by its distinctive fern-like foliage and edible roots. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bulga japonica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and dried root extracts, which can be used to make soups, tonics, and other medicinal products.
